outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran's New Supreme Leader Vows Hormuz Stays Closed — 3.2M Displaced, 200+ Children Among Dead
outlets.summary: Frames Day 13 around humanitarian toll — UNHCR reports 3.2 million displaced, 200+ children among 1,348 killed. Covers Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement vowing Hormuz stays closed. Balanced coverage of casualties on all sides.

outlets.name: PBS
outlets.headline: New Wave of Strikes Hit Tehran as Netanyahu Vows 'Many Surprises' for Next Phase of Iran War
outlets.summary: Leads with military escalation and Netanyahu's rhetoric from first wartime press conference. Also covers damage to Iranian cultural heritage sites including Golestan Palace and Chehel Sotoun.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Iran's New Supreme Leader Vows to Keep Blocking Strait of Hormuz as Oil Prices Spike Past $100
outlets.summary: Live blog covering Mojtaba Khamenei's statement, oil crossing $100, and IEA's 400M barrel emergency release failing to calm markets. Analysis argues Iran retains economic leverage through Hormuz despite military losses.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran Attacks Spread Across Middle East — IDF Kills Iranian Commander, Netanyahu Vows 'Crushing' Victory
outlets.summary: Frames conflict through security lens — leads with Iran's regional attacks, IDF killing of Iranian commander, and Netanyahu's confident press conference. Includes Rep. Mace's evacuation mission from the region.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: War Against Iran Expands Into Lebanon as Israel Battles Hezbollah Past Litani River
outlets.summary: Leads with Lebanon expansion — Israel pushing past Litani to Zahrani River. Frames the war as widening beyond Iran into multi-front regional conflict. Covers strikes on Beirut's Corniche evacuation zone.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: The Iranian Regime Is Dead, But What Comes Next Is Full Of Risk — Trump: 'I Couldn't Care Less'
outlets.summary: Examines the power vacuum in Iran after Khamenei's death. Strongly pro-operation, framing US strikes as justified. Focuses on regime change prospects while noting Mojtaba Khamenei's weakness.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran War Day 13: Mojtaba Khamenei's First Statement, Netanyahu Press Conference, Oil Crosses $100
outlets.summary: Day-by-day explainer framing conflict as 'US-Israel attacks.' Centers civilian casualties, 3.2M displaced, Pezeshkian's peace terms vs. Mojtaba's hardline stance. Comprehensive coverage of Iran leadership rift.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Markets Hit 2026 Lows — Dow Falls 739 Points as Oil Crosses $100, Iran's New Leader Vows Hormuz Stays Shut
outlets.summary: Markets-first framing — Dow below 47,000, all three indexes at 2026 lows, Brent past $100. IEA 400M barrel release fails to calm markets. Mojtaba Khamenei's Hormuz vow deepens energy crisis.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Six French Soldiers Wounded in Iraq Drone Attack — Netanyahu Threatens 'Many Surprises' as War Widens
outlets.summary: Leads with French angle — six soldiers wounded in Iraq. Also covers Netanyahu's press conference, KC-135 crash, and growing concerns about munitions depletion across all combatants.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Threatens Mojtaba Khamenei in First Wartime Press Conference — Sirens Sound Across Israel
outlets.summary: Liveblog leads with Netanyahu's press conference calling Mojtaba an 'IRGC puppet.' Covers MDA casualty reports from joint Iran-Hezbollah attacks and IDF retaliatory operations in Lebanon and Iran.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Sirens Sound Across Israel as Hezbollah-Iran Launch Joint Attack — IDF Strikes Nuclear-Linked Site
outlets.summary: Leads with joint Iran-Hezbollah attack (200 rockets from Hezbollah). Reports IDF strikes on Parchin-Taleghan 2 nuclear facility. Profiles Mojtaba Khamenei as potentially more dangerous than his father.

outlets.name: Ynet News
outlets.headline: Lebanon Rockets Wound One in Central Israel — Finance Ministry Lowers Growth Forecast, War 'Only a Few Weeks'
outlets.summary: Home-front perspective — reports debris and casualties from joint attack. Finance Ministry lowers growth forecast. Reports on Israeli hopes for Iranian revolution as Tehran warns 'protesters treated as enemies.'

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Ex-IRGC Chief: No Truce Until Iran Gets 'Definite Outcome' — Resistance Continues Despite Aggression
outlets.summary: Frames conflict as 'US-Israeli aggression.' Former IRGC chief Rezaei vows no truce until victory. Emphasizes Iran's continued military capability and Mojtaba Khamenei's defiant first statement.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Why Iran Is Fighting Like Never Before — Islamic Revolution Will Continue Despite Loss of Leader
outlets.summary: Frames Iran's response as unprecedented self-defense. Khamenei's assassination used as justification for all-out retaliation. Regime continuity messaging — officials say revolution will thrive despite loss of Supreme Leader.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran's Military Demonstrates Unbroken Capability — Resistance Axis Strikes Continue Across Region
outlets.summary: State news agency frames Iran's military response as proof of unbroken capability. Highlights Khoramshahr deployment and IRGC navy operations in Hormuz. Emphasizes civilian bombing toll to condemn US-Israel.
